title.zh: Pillar Two 從規則建構轉向行政簡化
title.en: Pillar Two shifts from rule-building to administrative simplification

summary.zh: 2026 年材料顯示，全球最低稅負的前沿不只是 15% 規則本身，而是安全港、資訊申報、爭端預防、稅收優惠如何被重新設計。
summary.en: The 2026 materials show that the frontier is no longer only the 15% rule, but safe harbours, reporting, dispute prevention, and redesign of tax incentives.

zh: 校讀安全港、爭端預防、QRTC 與補貼相關段落
形成規則、註釋與實務問題的對照筆記
標出需要回看官方版本的段落
en: Review safe harbour, dispute prevention, QRTC, and subsidy passages
Create notes linking rules, commentary, and practical questions
Mark passages that require checking against the official version

title.zh: UN 稅務合作框架公約與國際稅務治理重心移動
title.en: UN tax convention and the shift in international tax governance

summary.zh: UN 路線的研究價值在於制度正當性、發展中國家參與、徵稅權配置、跨境服務與爭端解決早期議定書。
summary.en: The UN track matters for legitimacy, developing-country participation, allocation of taxing rights, cross-border services, and early dispute-resolution protocols.

zh: 留意 2026/2027 談判文件的新版本
區分框架公約與早期議定書的法律功能
整理 OECD 與 UN 路線的制度差異
en: Distinguish the legal roles of the framework convention and early protocols
Compare the OECD and UN institutional tracks

title.zh: Danon/洛桑稅法圈：稅務爭端、投資仲裁與 Pillar Two
title.en: Danon/Lausanne tax ecosystem: tax disputes, investment arbitration, and Pillar Two

summary.zh: 洛桑 Tax Policy Center 的近期訊號集中在 MAP、稅務確定性、投資仲裁中的稅務議題，以及 Pillar Two 爭端預防。
summary.en: Recent Lausanne signals cluster around MAP, tax certainty, tax in investment arbitration, and Pillar Two dispute prevention.

zh: 固定留意 UNIL 研究頁與活動頁
LinkedIn 只作線索，重要內容回到官方頁或出版頁確認
整理 Danon、Chand、IFA、OECD、IBFD 的人物與機構關係
en: Keep watching UNIL research and event pages
Use LinkedIn as a clue only and confirm important items through official or publication pages
Map the Danon, Chand, IFA, OECD, and IBFD network

title.zh: 高淨值個人、財富稅與全球稅逃漏資料
title.en: High-net-worth individuals, wealth taxation, and global tax evasion data

summary.zh: UN 談判與 EU Tax Observatory 資料共同把高淨值個人有效課稅推成政策熱點，但規範設計、資料可得性與執行能力仍是核心限制。
summary.en: UN negotiations and EU Tax Observatory data push effective taxation of HNWIs into focus, while design, data availability, and enforcement capacity remain constraints.

zh: 說明 EU Tax Observatory 的估計方法與資料限制
整理離岸財富與高淨值個人課稅的可引用數據
補看 UN 文件中關於高淨值個人的承諾語句
en: Record EU Tax Observatory methodology and data limits
Organize usable data on offshore wealth and HNWI taxation
Review UN commitment language on high-net-worth individuals
